purpose: Separate true pipeline failures from source limitations that need official-source repair or archival research.

official_listing_evidence.title: Tribal Access to Certain Child Welfare and Criminal History Databases

items.reason: The Governor public link still returns a sign-in page, but an official State Publications Library PDF has been archived through manual intake and used in the structured EO layer.
items.next_action: No further EO-2019-007 source replacement is needed unless a newer official Governor-hosted file becomes available during a later source refresh.

items.reason: The document queue has no pending work, but many historical bill-text links point to legacy archive wrappers, blocked legacy hosts, or non-retryable missing files.
items.next_action: Use _CONTROL_PLANE/LEGISCAN_SOURCE_FINDER_CHECKLIST.json, _CONTROL_PLANE/MODERN_LEGISCAN_REPAIR_QUEUE.json, and _CONTROL_PLANE/LEGISCAN_REPAIR_PROGRESS_DASHBOARD.json to find, repair, and track the 41 modern-year items first, then build a legacy archive recovery strategy by host and year.

boundary: This register does not approve legal reliance on missing-source records. It documents why the download pipeline is closed while source-coverage repair remains open.
